NOTES: probe_p_8 and probec_p_8 cells must be replaced with buf_8 before DRT — met5 pin causes TritonRoute OOB crash
met5 TRACKS line must be stripped from DEF TRACKS section to prevent FastRoute using met5
-max_drc_iterations flag not valid in OpenROAD b16bda7e (throws STA-0562)
estimate_parasitics -global_routing requires global_route in same session; skip if reading DRT DEF directly
GDS export requires: gds read sky130_fd_sc_hd.gds BEFORE def read to get full cell geometry
